name: Sausage Broccoli Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 lb new red potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the corn, reserving the liquid.
2. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, brown the sausage. Once browned, remove and drain the sausage.
3. In the same pot, sauté the celery, onion, and red pepper for 3 minutes.
4. Add the reserved corn liquid, potatoes, and broth to the pot. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add the broccoli and continue simmering until cooked through.
6. Blend the cream of broccoli soup with the cream in a separate bowl.
7. Stir the blended mixture into the chowder.
8. Serve with fresh bread and butter. Optionally, add a dash of white Worcestershire sauce and 1 tablespoon red pepper oil for extra flavor.
